title: Bad Luck Bear forces opponent battle reroll once

card.rawText: Equip this card to 1 of your opponent's creatures. You may choose for them to re-roll either their Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle.

effect.value: Equip this card to 1 of your opponent's creatures. You may choose for them to re-roll either their Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle.

plan.title: Bad Luck Bear forces opponent battle reroll once
plan.summary: Equip Bad Luck Bear to opponent creature and verify you may force one Hit or Atk Dice reroll per battle.

notes: Read text first: Equip this card to 1 of your opponent's creatures. You may choose for them to re-roll either their Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle.

steps: Set up Bad Luck Bear according to its printed text.
Equip Bad Luck Bear to opponent creature and verify you may force one Hit or Atk Dice reroll per battle.
manualVerification: Confirm against printed text: Equip this card to 1 of your opponent's creatures. You may choose for them to re-roll either their Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle.
